stories.title: There's a new No. 1! Ranking the top 50 MLB prospe...
stories.summary: Starting with a big shake-up at the top, we rank baseball's next wave of stars.

stories.title: LeBron mulls Lakers-Thunder gap: 'Out-talented'
stories.summary: LeBron James says the Lakers were "out-talented" by the Thunder in the playoffs.

stories.title: USMNT's Richards tears ankle ligaments before WC
stories.summary: USMNT defender Chris Richards has suffered two torn ligaments in his ankle, Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner said Thursday, just five days before the U.S. roster is named for the 2026 World Cup.

stories.title: Spurs, already minus Fox, lose Harper (hammy)
stories.summary: Dylan Harper suffered a right hamstring injury during the Spurs' loss to the Thunder in Game 2 of the Western Conference finals.

stories.title: Eagles LB Smith arrested after car clocked at 135
stories.summary: Eagles linebacker Nolan Smith Jr. was arrested Friday and accused of speeding and reckless driving in Georgia, the Twiggs County Sheriff's Office told ESPN.
